creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
The web site used by this port, http://fbsdmon.org, has been taken over by cybersquatters.  That means that users are sending their system info to an unknown party.  The port has had no maintainer for almost two years and the original maintainer (and previous owner of the website) is not responding to email.

Also, it's redundant with the still-maintained sysutils/bsdstats.
